page_title: Type 3 Kiryū High Mobility Type EVA Unit-00 Color Ver.
text:
is a mecha in the GODZILLA vs EVANGELION collaboration series. It was based on the Mechagodzilla Type 3 featured in the film '. It uses the colors of the Evangelion Proto Type-00.

Profile

See complete profile at Godzilla Wikia.

Development

A PS, ABS, PVC plastic model named was sold at EVANGELION STORE and GODZILLA STORE. https://godzilla.store/shop/g/gGSG0530352/ It was announced in December 2024 to be sold in Late April 2025. It was initially set at the price of 28,600 yen (tax included). https://www.evastore.jp/shop/g/gA6007511/
